ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "ballpark" TEXT /* Name of the team's ballpark */,
  "ballpark_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's ballpark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, hitter) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player */,
  "pitching_era" TEXT /* Pitching ERA of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Number of the inning */,
  "inning_half" TEXT /* Half of the inning (e.g., B1, B2) */,
  "inning_score" INTEGER /* Score of the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inning */,
  "play_number" INTEGER /* Number of the play in the inning */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs in the inning */,
  "obc" TEXT /* Base occupancy (e.g., 0, 1B, 2B, 3B) */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the start of the play */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the start of the play */,
  "pitcher_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher's team */,
  "hitter_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hitter's team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play */,
  "old_result" TEXT /* Old result of the play */,
  "result_at_neutral" TEXT /* Result at neutral (e.g., 3B, 2B) */,
  "result_all_neutral" TEXT /* Result all neutral (e.g., 3B, 2B) */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Indicates if a run was scored */,
  "batter_wpa" TEXT /* Batter's win probability added (WPA) */,
  "pitcher_wpa" TEXT /* Pitcher's win probability added (WPA) */,
  "pr_3b" INTEGER /* Probability of a 3B hit */,
  "pr_2b" INTEGER /* Probability of a 2B hit */,
  "pr_1b" INTEGER /* Probability of a 1B hit */,
  "pr_ab" INTEGER /* Probability of an at-bat */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_result FOREIGN KEY ("result") REFERENCES play_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_pitcher_wpa FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_wpa") REFERENCES wpa_types ("wpa_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_hitter_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("hitter_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_batter_wpa FOREIGN KEY ("batter_wpa") REFERENCES wpa_types ("wpa_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_run FOREIGN KEY ("run") REFERENCES run_types ("run_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_pitcher_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the play */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitcher */,
  "pitcher_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher's team */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch */,
  "swing_type" TEXT /* Type of swing */,
  "pitch_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in pitch */,
  "pitch_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the pitch in mph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitchers_pitcher_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitchers_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitchers_pitch_type FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_type") REFERENCES pitch_types ("pitch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hitters" (
  "hitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hitter */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the play */,
  "hitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hitter */,
  "hitter_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hitter's team */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the hitter */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the hitter */,
  "hit_type" TEXT /* Type of hit (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hitters_hitter_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("hitter_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hitters_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_types" (
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch type */,
  "pitch_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swing_types" (
  "swing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swing type */,
  "swing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the swing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the swing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the play result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_types" (
  "run_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run type */,
  "run_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the run type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wpa_types" (
  "wpa_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WPA type */,
  "wpa_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the WPA type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WPA type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wpa_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., game data, player stats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "game_summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "winning_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning pitcher */,
  "losing_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing pitcher */,
  "save_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the save pitcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_save_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("save_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_losing_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_winning_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_pitcher_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player */,
  "pitching_era" TEXT /* Pitching ERA of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "win_percentage" TEXT /* Win percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
